__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Agris Gold Helmet,Ford Model T,Cats Musical,Feng Qinshan Stele,Nicomachean Ethics,Galileo's Telescope
|rank=orange
|amount=6
|category=self
|description=Per 100 times Ultimate Weapons forged, Snail ATK +12; Ultimate Weapons forged: 6,000/6,000
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
